topic_angle: 교수가 알면 화낼 GPT Projects 한 학기 통째로 학습시키기
essence_5: 한 학기 강의별 Project 만들기 (10과목 = 10개 Project)
답안 작성·첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기
rationale: 사용자 LOCK: landscape + #3B6E47 강제. 캠퍼스 자연광·candid 풍경 사진 위에 굵은 한글 텍스트 박스 nene 톤 추종. 딥 그린은 교과서·칠판·잔디 캠퍼스 정합.

slides.headline: 교수가 알면 화낼 GPT로 한 학기 통째 학습시키는 법
slides.label: GPT Project 꿀팁
slides.prompt:
Slide 1 message: "교수가 알면 화낼 GPT로 한 학기 통째 학습시키는 법" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학교 캠퍼스 본관 앞 잔디밭 광장을 늦은 오후 학생 1인칭 시점에서 candid로 찍은 풍경. 멀리 강의동 벽돌 건물과 큰 나무, 잔디 위로 길게 늘어진 그림자. 손에는 두꺼운 전공 책 한 권이 살짝 프레임 좌하단에 걸쳐 있다 (얼굴 X, 손목 아래만).

Korean university main campus quad, late afternoon golden hour just before blue hour. Foreground bottom-left: a student's hand holding a thick stack of textbooks and lecture printouts, photographed from first-person POV. Mid-ground: well-trimmed lawn with long shadows cast diagonally. Background: red-brick lecture building with tall windows, large zelkova tree to the right, a few students walking in soft focus far away. Sky has a warm-cool gradient (peach to deep teal).

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (golden hour, no artificial fill) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing tilted 5° · everyday Korean university campus scene · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: late golden hour, warm directional sun from left at 20° elevation, long natural shadows, no flash
- camera angle: eye-level first-person POV with slight downward tilt to include hand and books in lower frame
- composition: rule of thirds (lecture building on right-third intersection, hand on left-bottom third), leading lines from lawn edge to building
- mood: contemplative-anticipation, "개강 직전" recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (deep campus green for lawn and text box), warm brick #B5754A (building), beige sky highlight #F5F0E8, deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay box optional).

Display large hangul text "교수가 알면 화낼" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Below dominating the lower-center inside a deep green semi-transparent text box covering 55% of frame width: "GPT로 한 학기 통째 학습시키는 법" in clean white bold sans-serif. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy. The word "통째" subtly underscored or slightly larger weight.

Texture details: Kodak Portra 400 film grain feeling, subtle dust in sunbeam, real paper texture on textbooks, brick wall has visible mortar lines. No glossy CGI sheen.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px square handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). text reads first as primary visual, photo as supporting documentary background. negative space favors right-middle for breathing room.

No text other than the two hangul lines specified. No external account handles, no watermarks, no AI tool logos. No floating UI elements. No cinematic glow effects.

slides.headline: 강의 10과목, GPT Project도 10개로 쪼개기
slides.subtext: 섞으면 GPT가 헷갈려요 — 과목별로 딱 분리하기
slides.label: 비결 1 · 과목 분리
slides.prompt:
Slide 2 message: "강의 10과목, GPT Project도 10개로 쪼개기" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생 책상 위에 10권의 전공 교재가 가지런히 세로로 세워져 있고 각 책 표지 색이 다르게 candid로 찍힌 풍경. 책마다 한 과목 = 한 Project라는 시각 은유.

Korean university student desk shot from slightly elevated three-quarter angle. On the desk: 10 university textbooks neatly standing upright in a row like library shelf, varied spine colors (deep green, navy, burgundy, beige, mustard), each with handwritten Korean subject labels on small Post-it tabs (경영학, 통계, 미시경제, etc - visible but slightly out of focus). Beside the books: a closed MacBook in soft focus, a ceramic mug, one open notebook with a pen. Window light spills from the right.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (afternoon soft window light) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight tilt · everyday Korean dorm/study room · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft daylight from right window at 45° elevation, natural fill from white wall on left, no artificial light
- camera angle: high three-quarter overhead, 30° downward looking onto desk
- composition: rule of thirds (books occupy center-third forming horizontal leading line), repetition pattern of 10 spines as visual rhythm
- mood: organized-clarity, "정리되니까 시원하다" recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (one of the book spines and text box), warm beige #F5F0E8 (desk wood), neutral cream #EFE7D9 (wall background), text box deep slate #1A1A2E or white.

Display large hangul text "비결 1 · 과목 분리" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Below dominating upper 50% inside a deep green text box: "강의 10과목, GPT Project도 10개로 쪼개기" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller subtitle below in lighter weight: "섞으면 GPT가 헷갈려요". The word "쪼개기" subtly larger or with underline accent. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real cloth/paper book spine textures, Post-it slight wrinkle, wood grain on desk visible, Fuji Pro 400H film grain feeling. No glossy CGI.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px square). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text dominant top half, photo bottom half. avoid centered everything.

No text other than specified hangul lines. The Post-it Korean labels on books should look hand-written and small (not headline-sized). No external handles. No floating UI.

slides.headline: 강의노트·PPT·교재 PDF를 Project에 한 번에 던지는 법
slides.subtext: 파일 올리면 GPT가 학기 내내 기억해줘요
slides.label: 비결 2 · 파일 업로드
slides.prompt:
Slide 3 message: "강의노트·PPT·교재 PDF를 Project에 한 번에 던지는 법" → visual metaphor: 책상 위에 강의 자료가 쌓인 더미 candid scene — 인쇄된 PPT 출력물, 손글씨 노트, 그리고 그 옆 노트북에는 ChatGPT Projects 파일 업로드 화면이 켜져 있다. 종이 자료가 디지털로 흡수되는 시각 은유.

Korean university study desk close shot. Foreground: a messy but organized stack of printed PPT handouts (4-up slides visible), a spiral-bound lecture notebook with Korean handwritten notes peeking out, and a textbook with sticky notes. Beside the stack: an open laptop screen showing the ChatGPT Projects file upload interface (file list with PDF icons named in Korean like "미시경제_3주차.pdf", "경영전략_중간정리.pdf" - subtle, readable but not dominant). A hand from the upper-right edge is just letting go of a paper.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (late morning soft window light) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld 3° tilt · everyday Korean student workspace · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI cards · NOT editorial · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft natural daylight from left window at 40° elevation, neutral white fill, no artificial light or screen glow exaggeration
- camera angle: eye-level slight overhead, 25° downward
- composition: rule of thirds (laptop screen right-third, paper stack center-bottom), leading lines from paper edges toward laptop
- mood: relieved-organized, "이제 다 들어갔다" recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (text box and one notebook cover), paper white #FAFAF7, warm wood #C8A47C (desk), screen muted gray #E5E5E5 (laptop UI), subtle navy accents.

Display large hangul text "비결 2 · 파일 업로드" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Dominating lower 55% inside a white text box with deep green border or solid deep green box: "강의노트·PPT·교재 PDF를 Project에 한 번에 던지는 법" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller line below: "학기 내내 GPT가 기억해줘요". The phrase "한 번에" slightly larger or accent-colored. Hangul perfect 받침·자모.

Texture details: real paper fiber, slight crumple on handouts, handwritten Korean ink visible, MacBook aluminum subtle reflection, no halo glow on screen, Kodak film grain feeling.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text dominant lower half, scene upper half. ChatGPT UI on screen must look like real authentic interface not invented.

No external handles. No watermarks. No floating UI outside the legitimate laptop screen. No cinematic glow.

slides.headline: system prompt에 교수 출제 패턴 먼저 학습시키기
slides.subtext: 이걸 박아두면 GPT 답변 톤이 달라지거든요
slides.label: 비결 3 · 시스템 프롬프트
slides.prompt:
Slide 4 message: "system prompt에 교수 출제 패턴 먼저 학습시키기" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생이 지난 학기 기출문제 프린트물에 형광펜으로 출제 패턴을 표시한 페이지가 책상 위에 놓이고, 그 옆에 노트북 화면이 ChatGPT의 system instructions 입력창을 보여주는 candid scene. 종이의 분석이 디지털 지시문으로 흘러간다.

Korean university student desk close shot. Foreground: a past exam printout (기출문제 in Korean header visible top of paper) with yellow and green highlighter strokes marking patterns, handwritten margin notes in Korean ("매년 단답형 3문제", "논술 2번 고정" - subtle, readable). A highlighter pen rests on the paper. Beside it: laptop showing ChatGPT custom instructions / Project system prompt text area with Korean text being typed (visible cursor). Natural daylight from upper-left.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (early afternoon mixed daylight) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight tilt · everyday Korean library or study cafe table · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI · NOT editorial · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: natural daylight from upper-left window at 35° elevation, balanced fill, no flash or screen glow boost
- camera angle: high three-quarter, 30° downward over the desk
- composition: rule of thirds (exam paper left-third with highlighter marks, laptop right-third), diagonal flow from paper to screen
- mood: focused-strategic, "패턴 파악" detective recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (text box and one highlighter color), highlighter yellow #FFEB7A and green #A8E6A1 subtle on paper, paper cream #FAFAF7, desk wood warm beige #C8A47C, deep slate #1A1A2E.

Display large hangul text "비결 3 · 시스템 프롬프트" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Dominating upper 55% inside a deep green solid text box: "system prompt에 교수 출제 패턴 먼저 학습시키기" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller line below: "답변 톤이 달라져요". The phrase "출제 패턴" subtly larger or with white underline. Hangul perfect 받침·자모. Allow English "system prompt" lowercase as is.

Texture details: real paper fiber and slight curl, highlighter ink bleed-through subtle, handwritten ballpoint pen marks, MacBook aluminum natural finish, Fuji film grain feeling.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text dominant top, photo lower. ChatGPT interface on screen must look authentic.

No external handles. No floating UI outside laptop screen. No cinematic glow effects.

slides.headline: 시험 전날 GPT한테 예상문제 10개 뽑아달라 하기
slides.subtext: 족보 없어도 괜찮아요 — GPT가 대신 예측해줘요
slides.label: 비결 4 · 예상문제
slides.prompt:
Slide 5 message: "시험 전날 GPT한테 예상문제 10개 뽑아달라 하기" → visual metaphor: 시험 전날 늦은 밤 한국 대학교 도서관 또는 24시간 카페 창가 자리. 노트북 화면에 ChatGPT가 1번부터 10번까지 예상문제 목록을 한글로 출력 중이고, 옆에는 빈 노트와 펜, 따뜻한 커피 한 잔. 창밖은 어두운 캠퍼스 야경.

Korean university 24-hour study cafe or library window seat at night around 11 PM. Foreground: laptop angled three-quarter toward camera, screen displays ChatGPT response with Korean numbered list "1. ~문제 ...", "2. ~문제 ..." up to roughly 10 (subtle readable). To laptop's right: an open blank notebook ready to write on, a black gel pen, a paper coffee cup with slight steam. Background through window: blurred dark campus buildings with warm yellow window lights, slight reflection of student's interior on glass.

medium: smartphone candid · natural mixed light (warm interior cafe tungsten + cool night window) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight tilt · everyday Korean late-night study scene · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT screen halo boost · NOT editorial · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm interior overhead pendant at 60° elevation (soft tungsten ~3000K), cool ambient from window, laptop screen provides natural soft fill on desk surface only (no glow halo)
- camera angle: eye-level slight three-quarter from student's right shoulder
- composition: rule of thirds (laptop screen on left-two-thirds, notebook on right-third), leading lines from window frame toward laptop
- mood: late-night-determined, "오늘 안에 끝낸다" recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (text box), warm tungsten amber #E8B574 (interior light), deep night blue #1A2638 (window background), cream paper #FAFAF7, slate text overlay #1A1A2E.

Display large hangul text "비결 4 · 예상문제" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Dominating lower 55% inside a deep green solid text box: "시험 전날 GPT한테 예상문제 10개 뽑아달라 하기" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller secondary line: "족보 없어도 괜찮아요". The word "예상문제" slightly larger or with white underline accent. Hangul perfect 받침·자모.

Texture details: real paper notebook fiber, ceramic/paper coffee cup texture, MacBook aluminum natural reflection, slight condensation on window, Kodak Portra 400 film grain feeling. Screen content readable but not glowing supernaturally.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text dominant lower half. screen content authentic ChatGPT interface.

No external handles. No floating UI outside screen. No cinematic glow. No neon.

slides.headline: 답안 쓰고 첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기
slides.subtext: GPT가 교수 시각으로 빨간 펜 대신 쳐줘요
slides.label: 비결 5 · 첨삭 루프
slides.prompt:
Slide 6 message: "답안 쓰고 첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생이 시험 답안을 손글씨로 적은 노트 페이지가 책상 위에 펼쳐져 있고, 그 옆 노트북 ChatGPT 화면에는 GPT가 답안을 분석·첨삭한 피드백 텍스트(빨간 줄·코멘트)가 표시되는 candid scene. 손글씨와 디지털 첨삭이 한 프레임에 공존.

Korean university student desk afternoon scene. Foreground: an open spiral notebook with a full page of Korean handwritten essay answer (한글 손글씨, 본인 답안), some lines underlined or marked. Beside the notebook on laptop screen: ChatGPT response showing analyzed feedback with bullet points and quoted phrases (Korean text like "이 부분은 근거 부족", "논점 흐름 좋음" subtle but readable). A red ballpoint pen lies across the notebook diagonally. Soft afternoon daylight from window left.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (mid afternoon soft window light) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight tilt · everyday Korean study workspace · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI · NOT editorial · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: natural daylight from left window at 40° elevation, neutral cool-warm balance, no flash
- camera angle: high three-quarter overhead, 35° downward
- composition: rule of thirds (notebook handwriting left-third, laptop screen right-two-thirds), diagonal pen creates leading line between paper and screen
- mood: collaborative-loop, "GPT가 봐주는 느낌" recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (text box), red pen accent #C73E3E small detail, paper cream #FAFAF7, desk warm beige #C8A47C, slate #1A1A2E text overlay, screen muted neutral.

Display large hangul text "비결 5 · 첨삭 루프" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Dominating upper 55% inside a deep green solid text box: "답안 쓰고 첨삭까지 같은 Project 안에서 끝내기" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller below: "빨간 펜 대신 GPT가 쳐줘요". The word "끝내기" subtly larger or with white underline. Tiny gray sub-CTA bottom-right of photo area: "저장해두면 시험기간에 도움". Hangul perfect 받침·자모.

Texture details: real handwritten ballpoint ink texture on paper, notebook spiral binding visible, MacBook aluminum natural finish, Fuji Pro 400H film grain feeling. No halo on screen.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text dominant top half. screen content authentic ChatGPT.

No external handles. No floating UI outside screen. No cinematic glow.

slides.headline: 이 세팅으로 전공 5과목 시험 전날 예상문제 50개 뽑았어요
slides.label: 실전 기록 · 50문제
slides.prompt:
Slide 7 message: "이 세팅으로 전공 5과목 시험 전날 예상문제 50개 뽑았어요" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생 책상에 5과목 분량의 예상문제 출력물이 부채꼴로 펼쳐져 있는 candid scene. 종이 더미 위에 형광펜·포스트잇·노트북이 함께. 실제 결과물 증거.

Korean university student desk top-down slightly tilted view. Center: five stacks of printed A4 papers fanned out like a hand of cards, each stack labeled with a Korean subject name on a Post-it tab (경영학원론, 통계분석, 미시경제, 마케팅, 회계원리). Each printout visibly shows numbered questions in Korean (1. ~, 2. ~ visible in soft focus). Some pages have yellow highlighter marks. To the side: a laptop in soft background focus, a half-empty coffee mug, a pen, a phone face-down. Soft daylight from upper-right window.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (late morning soft window light) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight 5° tilt · everyday Korean dorm or study cafe table · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI · NOT editorial · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: natural daylight from upper-right window at 40° elevation, soft fill, no flash, no exaggerated screen glow
- camera angle: high overhead 70° downward looking onto desk, slight off-center
- composition: centered radial fan of 5 paper stacks as primary subject, rule of thirds for laptop and accessories on periphery
- mood: proud-evidence, "이만큼 했다" satisfaction recognition

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (text box and one Post-it tab), highlighter yellow #FFEB7A subtle, paper cream #FAFAF7, warm wood desk #C8A47C, deep slate #1A1A2E.

Display large hangul text "실전 기록 · 50문제" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Dominating upper 50% inside a deep green solid text box: "전공 5과목 시험 전날 예상문제 50개" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller below in lighter weight: "족보 0장 → 50개 · 준비시간 3시간 절약". The number "50개" significantly larger emphasized — almost double font size, white with subtle drop shadow. Hangul perfect 받침·자모.

Texture details: real paper stack edges visible, slight curl on printouts, Post-it tab adhesive shine, ballpoint pen ink, ceramic mug coffee ring, Kodak Portra 400 film grain feeling.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text dominant top half, scene bottom half. numbers must read at a glance.

No external handles. No floating UI. No cinematic glow effects.

slides.headline: 저장해두고 학기 시작 전에 한 번만 세팅해봐요
slides.subtext: 팔로우하고 댓글 달면 세팅 프롬프트 DM 보내드려요
slides.label: 저장·팔로우·DM
slides.prompt:
Slide 8 message: "저장해두고 학기 시작 전에 한 번만 세팅해봐요" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학교 캠퍼스 늦은 오후 풍경 (강의동·잔디·하늘) candid 사진 위에 Instagram 팔로우 버튼 mockup + 저장 북마크 아이콘 + DM 종이비행기 아이콘 3종이 시각적으로 배치된 CTA 슬라이드. 본인 운영자 손이 프레임 하단에 노트북과 함께 살짝 등장.

Korean university campus late afternoon scene. Background: a calm campus path lined with cherry blossom or zelkova trees, lecture building in the distance, warm golden sky transitioning to soft blue. Lower-right foreground: a 30s Korean operator's hand resting on an open MacBook keyboard (only hand and wrist visible, no face), the laptop slightly out of focus but recognizable as a study workspace. The campus serves as backdrop, the workspace anchors lower-right.

On top of this photo, three CTA UI elements placed clearly:
1. A blue Instagram-style 팔로우 button mockup rounded rectangle in the right-middle area with Korean text "팔로우" white bold inside, accent color matching Instagram blue #4F5BD5 or our deep green #3B6E47 — clearly readable as a button.
2. A bookmark icon (Instagram save outline icon, simple line svg style) with small Korean label "저장" below it, placed left-middle.
3. A paper-plane DM icon (Instagram share-arrow style) with small Korean label "DM" below, placed center-bottom area.
These three icons form a visible row or triangle composition, each ~80-100px size, clean flat outline style not photographic.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (golden hour campus exterior) · iPhone 15 default rendering · handheld slight tilt · everyday Korean campus + workspace candid hybrid · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: golden hour warm directional sun from left at 25° elevation, long natural shadows, no flash
- camera angle: eye-level slight downward tilt to include hand and keyboard in lower-right
- composition: rule of thirds (campus path center, hand+laptop lower-right third, CTA icons distributed across middle band), leading lines from path toward horizon
- mood: friendly-invitation, "같이 해보자" warmth

Color palette: accent #3B6E47 (main text box and follow button), warm golden #E8B574 (sky highlight), beige #F5F0E8, deep slate #1A1A2E (text overlay).

Display large hangul text "저장·팔로우·DM" with bold sans-serif typography in upper-left rounded white pill label, dark text. Dominating upper 45% inside a deep green solid text box: "저장해두고 학기 시작 전에 한 번만 세팅해봐요" white bold Pretendard Black. Smaller line below: "팔로우하고 댓글 달면 세팅 프롬프트 DM 보내드려요". The word "저장" subtly larger or with white underline. Hangul perfect 받침·자모.

Texture details: real campus foliage detail, MacBook aluminum natural finish, hand skin texture natural, Kodak Portra 400 film grain feeling. CTA icons flat clean line vector style, not 3D, not glowing.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (~120px square handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). text dominant top, scene+CTA icons middle, hand+keyboard lower-right. follow button + save bookmark + DM paper-plane must all three be clearly visible and identifiable.

No external handles. No watermarks. No AI tool logos. No cinematic glow effects. No neon. The three CTA icons (follow button mockup, bookmark, paper-plane) are mandatory and must be visually clear.
